CustomField.description: This field used for Mexico OCSM translate
CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c,'Choose Mobility'),"Cotización", IF(ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c,'Contract management'),"Gestión de clientes", IF(ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c,'End of contract'),"Devolución de vehiculos", IF(ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c,'Finance'),"Facturación", IF(ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c,'Insurance'),"Seguros y Siniestros", IF(ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c,'Maintenance'),"Mantenimiento", IF(ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c,'Management Services'),"Gestión vehicular", IF(ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c,'Mobility Services'),"Movilidad", IF(ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c,'Order & Delivery'),"Compras y Entregas", IF(ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c,'Reporting'),"Reportes", IF(ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c,'Roadside & Call Centre'),"Asistencia",IF(ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c,'Tires'),"Llantas",' '))))))))))))
CustomField.label: MEX Translate
